_comment: This is the STATIC portion of Startup Optimizer's catalog only (formerly Level 3: Windows Extras + Leftover Toggles). The dynamic portion (Run keys, startup-folder shortcuts, logon scheduled tasks — formerly Levels 1-2) is discovered live per PC via changes/PC Startup/Enumerate.ps1 at scan time, not listed here. Several entries below share the exact same script as an FPS Optimizer manifest entry (§3, §0 #5) — the two former catalogs' Widgets/Copilot/aimgr/Edge-boost items were identical duplicates, merged into one canonical script each.

Name: Remove Widgets apps
Desc: News/widgets feed pipeline (WebExperience + WidgetsPlatformRuntime). The Settings "Widgets" toggle disappears after removal — expected.

Name: Widgets / news feed off (policy)
Desc: Blocks the widgets/news pipeline by policy so Windows Update can't quietly bring it back to life.

Name: Remove Copilot
Desc: The AI assistant most people never asked for — removes its background presence.

Name: Remove Microsoft AI Manager (aimgr)
Desc: Background AI component. Windows Update reinstalls it — re-run this tool after big updates.

Name: Block Edge startup boost (policy)
Desc: Edge preloads at logon. Policy stops it. WebView2 security updates are untouched.

Name: Block Edge background mode (policy)
Desc: Edge lingers after you close it. Policy stops it. WebView2 security updates are untouched.

Name: Purge inert StartupApproved leftovers
Desc: Old enable/disable toggle entries whose actual startup entry is long gone — registry clutter from uninstalled apps. Names are matched exactly (some have trailing spaces).
